channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] Imbad0202/academic-research-skills — Academic Research Skills for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize
item.description: Academic research skills framework for Claude Code provides tools for research, writing, review, revision, and finalization workflows.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] HKUDS/CLI-Anything — "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/
item.description: GitHub trending project CLI-Anything enables software to become agent-native.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] ggml-org/llama.cpp — LLM inference in C/C++
item.description: llama.cpp provides C/C++ based inference for large language models.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] tech-leads-club/agent-skills — The secure, validated skill registry for professional AI coding agents. Extend Antigravity, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot and more with absolute confidence.
item.description: GitHub project agent-skills provides a validated skill registry for integrating extensions into AI coding agents like Claude Code, Cursor, and Copilot.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] BigBodyCobain/Shadowbroker — Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.
item.description: Open-source intelligence platform Shadowbroker aggregates data on private jets, satellites, and seismic events in a unified interface with AI agent support.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] humanlayer/12-factor-agents — What are the principles we can use to build LLM-powered software that is actually good enough to put in the hands of production customers?
item.description: Repository presents 12-factor principles for developing production-grade LLM-powered software.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] NVlabs/Sana — SANA: Efficient High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Linear Diffusion Transformer
item.description: SANA uses a linear diffusion transformer for efficient high-resolution image synthesis.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners — 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents
item.description: Microsoft's ai-agents-for-beginners provides 12 lessons for learning to build AI agents.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis — LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.
item.description: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis — LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

item.title: [Hacker News] Eric Schmidt speech about AI booed during graduation
item.description: Eric Schmidt speech about AI booed during graduation
